title: ITC Limited Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ITC Limited Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at ITC Limited Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ITC Limited Digital Technologies:
ITC Limited Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited Digital Technologies!
